creator: tut@nhamon.com.ua
text:
Changes:
  * update to recent 810.11
  * fix power source detection (AC/battery) - binary NVIDIA X.org driver uses wrong matching pattern for ACAD notify events
  * add some hints for power saving

Zander from www.nvnews.net (NVIDIA) have just confirmed that the bug with power source detection is in their bugreport system now. Hope it will be fixed in upcoming release.
